variants.title: Fleetguard LF3363 Lube Filter, Full-Flow Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P502081
variants.description: Fleetguard® LF3363 spin-on lube filter meets or exceeds OE performance requirements and the new challenges of modern engine technology.

variants.title: Donaldson P502081 Lube Spin-On Full Flow
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P502081 Lube Spin-On Full Flow is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
